chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 5480 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.15236/2016 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 20-10-2022 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks releasing of his salary by the respondents on the ground that he was issued offer letter on 21-02-2011 for appointment on the post of Malhi by respondent No.2 [Executive District Officer (Health), District Khairpur], yet he was not issued salary. Comments have been filed by respondent No.2, wherein it has been stated that no personnel file is available at his office. Besides, the matter was decided by this Court, wherein 36 fake and forged appointments were investigated by the enquiry team consisting of two Secretaries of Health Department and officer of NAB Sukkur and their petition was dismissed by this Court. It also appears that copy of the comments was supplied to learned Counsel for the petitioner on 27-10-2020, and thereafter, the matter was fixed on 01-12-2020, when learned Counsel sought time for preparation; today, he is not in attendance. Since this petition carries disputed issues of facts with regard to alleged so called appointment of the petitioner, the same being not maintainable in law is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
